title: Slipboot
description: A warp system similar to Waystones, but with a geopolitical twist!
body:
Slipboot is a custom warp system similar to other popular mods such as Waystones, but where the warp points are manually set by a server administrator and can be broken, repaired, and renamed by players.

This type of system allows for more meaningful conflict and faction dynamics as these points are far more limited and sought after. Additionally, it integrates with BlueMap and works cross-dimensionally.

This mod was developed for [Landfall-830: Digital Deicide](https://modrinth.com/modpack/landfall-830-digital-deicide).
